name: Finish the purchase of the products in the cart
scenarioId: boughtProduct:Finish the purchase of the products in the cart
methodName: Finish the purchase of the products in the cart

testSteps.description: Given the customer is on the Demoblaze home page as a guest user
When the customer goes to "Cart" page
And the customer clicks on Place Order button
And the customer fills in the purchase form with valid information
